intent: Clean up public membership value messaging, remove Founder video updates from Elite/Eternal membership, and scan for related website fixes.
summary: Public membership value copy was cleaned up to remove internal pricing strategy, future pricing proposal language, and stale Founder-video entitlement promises.

Removed Founder video updates from Eternal/Elite value copy.

ignisNote: This was a compact but high-trust public-copy correction: the website now talks like a member-facing product surface instead of exposing internal pricing strategy.
blockers: Annual checkout remains unverified end-to-end in browser.
Social Dashboard mirror still requires founder confirmation before cross-repo writes.
Forge Window nav rename still awaits brand sign-off.
